assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Agent eventually committed screenshots, but required multiple attempts to discover the correct Grafana URL pattern and dashboard UIDs.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Agent used a reasonable naming convention (before-overview.png, after-overview.png) after reading copilot-instructions.md.

assertions.description: No before screenshots were taken (after-only is the default)
assertions.evidence: Without the skill specifying after-only as default, the agent took both before and after screenshots even though the user did not request before screenshots. The copilot-instructions.md mentions before/after but does not specify a default mode.

assertions.description: Only affected dashboards are screenshotted — no unmodified dashboards
assertions.evidence: Agent correctly identified affected dashboards from git diff, though it took extra steps to figure out the mapping.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Agent waited for panels to load before capturing, following guidance from copilot-instructions.md.
